title: Uniblock Token
description: Schema representing a fungible token with metadata, balance, and transfer information as returned by the Uniblock Unified API.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the token on the blockchain.

chain.description: The blockchain network identifier (e.g., ethereum, polygon, solana).

name.description: The display name of the token.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol of the token.

decimals.description: The number of decimal places the token uses.

logo.description: URL to the token logo image.

totalSupply.description: The total supply of the token in its smallest unit.

TokenBalance.description: Balance of a specific token held by a wallet address.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the token.

name.description: The display name of the token.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol of the token.

decimals.description: The number of decimal places the token uses.

balance.description: The token balance in its smallest unit.

balanceFormatted.description: The token balance formatted with proper decimal places.

TokenTransfer.description: A token transfer event between two addresses on the blockchain.

transactionHash.description: The hash of the transaction containing this transfer.

value.description: The amount transferred in the token's smallest unit.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the transferred token.

tokenName.description: The name of the transferred token.

tokenSymbol.description: The symbol of the transferred token.

blockNumber.description: The block number in which the transfer occurred.

blockTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the block in which the transfer occurred.

TokenAllowance.description: A token spending allowance granted to a spender contract.

contractAddress.description: The smart contract address of the token.

spender.description: The address of the approved spender.

allowance.description: The approved allowance amount in the token's smallest unit.

TokenPrice.description: Price data for a token from aggregated market sources.

usdPrice.description: The current price of the token in USD.

contractAddress.description: The contract address of the token.
